description: 'TODO' appears in a string being tested, not as a code comment — should pass
input:
class TaskParserTest < ActiveSupport::TestCase
  test "parses a TODO item from plain text" do
    text = "TODO: follow up with legal"
    task = TaskParser.new(text).parse
    assert_equal "follow up with legal", task.title
    assert_equal :todo, task.kind
  end
end
